channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Letters from a WWII soldier to his sweetheart offer an intimate picture of love during wartime
item.description: A trove of more than 200 letters from World War II that were found in a Tennessee home offers an intimate picture of love during wartime

item.title: Six months after explosion, Pennsylvania mill town sees hope but a history of disappointment
item.description: Six months ago, an explosion at the U.S. Steel Clairton Coke Works killed two people

item.title: CBO: Federal deficits and debt to worsen over next decade
item.description: The Congressional Budget Office projects worsening federal deficits and rising debt over the next decade, driven by increased spending on Social Secur...

item.title: The Latest: FAA lifts temporary closure of airspace over El Paso, Texas
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration has reopened the airspace around El Paso International Airport in Texas, just hours after it announced a 10-day cl...

item.title: US adds surprising 130,000 jobs last month yet revisions cut hundreds of thousands of jobs last year
item.description: U.S. employers added a surprisingly strong 130,000 jobs last month, but government revisions cut 2024-2025 U.S. payrolls by hundreds of thousands
